components.name: 5. 每孔加 10 µL MTT (5 mg/mL)
components.note: MTT 母液: 5 mg/mL in PBS, 0.22 µm 过滤, 4°C 避光保存 ≤4 周

components.name: 8. 每孔加 100 µL DMSO 溶解

notes.en: Colorimetric assay measuring cell metabolic activity as proxy for viability. MTT (yellow) is reduced to formazan (purple) by mitochondrial reductases. OD570 proportional to viable cell number. Include blank wells.
notes.zh: 比色法检测细胞代谢活力。MTT 被线粒体还原酶还原为甲臜结晶。OD570 与活细胞数成正比。需设空白对照孔。% 活力 = (OD处理/OD对照) × 100。
